- chore(deps): Bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.9.1 to 1.10.1 in the all group by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​172](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/172)
- chore(deps): Bump the all group across 1 directory with 2 updates by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​176](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/176)
- workflows: add explicit permissions to fix CodeQL warnings by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​177](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/177)
- go.mod: bump minimum Go version to 1.24.6 by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​178](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/178)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/compare/v1.4.0...v1.4.1>
